untranslatable_reason: The signal references undefined constructs: '+A' (not a standard indicator), 'ORL' (not in allowed indicators), 'profit target' (unknown level), and 'some time interval' (unspecified duration). Without explicit definitions of these levels and the pullback time threshold, this cannot be reliably translated to measurable conditions.
translation_notes: Attempted mapping: Used pivot as proxy for '+A' (support/resistance level), s1 (first support) as proxy for stop placement near 'ORL', and crosses_above for entry trigger. However, this is speculative. The rule requires author clarification on: (1) exact definition of +A level, (2) exact definition of ORL level, (3) time interval threshold for 'some time', and (4) completion of the source text.
